julia> evaluate_s(123)
([0.03, 0.03, 0.03, 0.03, 0.542, 0.03, 0.03, 0.03, 0.539, 0.03  …  0.31977777777777777, 0.19066666666666665, 0.1628888888888889, 0.18466666666666665, 0.15433333333333332, 0.1321111111111111, 0.18466666666666665, 0.19066666666666665, 0.1628888888888889, 0.1628888888888889], UInt64[0x00000144a58e265c])

julia> evaluate_s(123)
([7, 7, 7, 7, 7, 7, 7, 7, 6, 7  …  8, 8, 8, 8, 8, 9, 9, 9, 9, 9], UInt64[0x00000144a58e265c], EvaluatedState[EvaluatedState(0x0000000000000000, 0.03, 0), EvaluatedState(0x0000012000000000, 0.03, 1), EvaluatedState(0x0000013000000000, 0.03, 1), EvaluatedState(0x0000014000000000, 0.03, 1), EvaluatedState(0x0000015000000000, 0.542, 1), EvaluatedState(0x000001a000000000, 0.03, 1), EvaluatedState(0x000001b000000000, 0.03, 1), EvaluatedState(0x000001c000000000, 0.03, 1), EvaluatedState(0x000001d000000000, 0.539, 1), EvaluatedState(0x0000022000000000, 0.03, 1)  …  EvaluatedState(0x00000156807216ec, 0.31977777777777777, 6), EvaluatedState(0x000000000a7216ec, 0.19066666666666665, 5), EvaluatedState(0x000001500a7216ec, 0.1628888888888889, 6), EvaluatedState(0x000002200a7216ec, 0.18466666666666665, 6), EvaluatedState(0x000000000b7216ec, 0.15433333333333332, 5), EvaluatedState(0x000001500b7216ec, 0.1321111111111111, 6), EvaluatedState(0x000002200b7216ec, 0.18466666666666665, 6), EvaluatedState(0x00000000127216ec, 0.19066666666666665, 5), EvaluatedState(0x00000130127216ec, 0.1628888888888889, 6), EvaluatedState(0x00000150127216ec, 0.1628888888888889, 6)])



julia> evaluate_s(123)
(counter1, counter2) = (0, 0)
([7, 7, 7, 6, 7, 7, 7, 7, 7, 7  …  8, 8, 8, 8, 8, 9, 8, 8, 8, 8], UInt64[0x00000144a58e265c], EvaluatedState[EvaluatedState(0x0000000000000000, 0.03, 0), EvaluatedState(0x0000012000000000, 0.03, 1), EvaluatedState(0x0000013000000000, 0.03, 1), EvaluatedState(0x0000014000000000, 0.03, 1), EvaluatedState(0x0000015000000000, 0.542, 1), EvaluatedState(0x000001a000000000, 0.03, 1), EvaluatedState(0x000001b000000000, 0.03, 1), EvaluatedState(0x000001c000000000, 0.03, 1), EvaluatedState(0x000001d000000000, 0.539, 1), EvaluatedState(0x0000022000000000, 0.03, 1)  …  EvaluatedState(0x00000156807216ec, 0.31977777777777777, 6), EvaluatedState(0x000000000a7216ec, 0.19066666666666665, 5), EvaluatedState(0x000001500a7216ec, 0.1628888888888889, 6), EvaluatedState(0x000002200a7216ec, 0.18466666666666665, 6), EvaluatedState(0x000000000b7216ec, 0.15433333333333332, 5), EvaluatedState(0x000001500b7216ec, 0.1321111111111111, 6), EvaluatedState(0x000002200b7216ec, 0.18466666666666665, 6), EvaluatedState(0x00000000127216ec, 0.19066666666666665, 5), EvaluatedState(0x00000130127216ec, 0.1628888888888889, 6), EvaluatedState(0x00000150127216ec, 0.1628888888888889, 6)])


function evaluate_s(target_seed::Integer)
    puzzle = generate(target_seed)
    minosdata, starts, goals = minos_start_end(puzzle)
    
    start_pos1 = (starts[1].x, starts[1].y)
    start_pos2 = (starts[2].x, starts[2].y)
    goal_pos1  = (goals[1].x,  goals[1].y)
    goal_pos2  = (goals[2].x,  goals[2].y)
    
    # 1. 全状態列挙
    states = collect_all_states_bitboard(minosdata)
    num_nodes = length(states)

    # 逆引き辞書とビットボード配列の領域確保
    state_to_id = Dict{UInt64, Int}()
    sizehint!(state_to_id, num_nodes)
    boards = Vector{UInt32}(undef, num_nodes)

    scores = Vector{EvaluatedState}(undef, num_nodes)
    correct_states = Vector{UInt64}()
    grid = Matrix{Int8}(undef, 5, 5)

    # 2. 【1次審査】レーザーの評価 ＆ データのマッピング
    for (i, s) in enumerate(states)
        state_to_id[s] = i
        fill!(grid, Int8(0))
        
        # 盤面復元とレーザーシミュを同時に行う（内部でデコードした結果のgridを利用してboards[i]に焼き付ける）
        # ※ boards[i] をここで回収できるようにしておくとスマートです
        score, mino_number, is_correct = simulate_laser_score_and_check(s, minosdata, grid, start_pos1, start_pos2, goal_pos1, goal_pos2)
        
        scores[i] = EvaluatedState(s, score, mino_number)
        
        # ついでにboardsをここで作ってしまう（前述の配列一括復元ロジックをインライン化）
        # ※ 難易度モデルに応じてboardsの生成をここに配置します
        if is_correct
            push!(correct_states, s)
        end
    end
    
    # 仮に複数正解があった場合は最初の1つを基準にする（通常は1つ）
    if !isempty(correct_states)
        true_state = correct_states[1]
        
        # 3. 【2次審査の準備】 true_state からの全最短手数を一括計算
        # 各ノードのboardsが完全に埋まっている状態で呼び出します
        distances = Vector{Int}(undef, num_nodes)
        
        # ※あらかじめ前計算したall_candidatesを引数に持ってくる必要があります
        all_candidates = precompute_candidates_bitboard(minosdata)
        
        # boardsを事前に正しく作っておく必要があります（前述のbuild_puzzle_graph...内の復元処理など）
        # ここでは事前にboardsが埋められていると仮定します
        compute_all_mino_distances!(distances, states, boards, state_to_id, true_state, all_candidates)
        
        # これで各ノードの「正解への最短手数」が distances[i] に格納されました！
        # distances[i] を使って f(s) の数理モデル（Prox_mino = 1 / (1 + dist)）を計算可能になります
    end

    sort!(scores, by = x -> x.laser_score, rev = true)

    return scores, correct_states
end
